entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INPUT AND SERVICES MARKETS (AI-SM)
entities.description: Markets for agricultural inputs and services that drive agricultural growth and development

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The geographic region where the analysis of agricultural input and services markets is focused

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURAL GROWTH
entities.description: Long-term increase in agricultural productivity and development that is environmentally and socially viable

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Environmental shift posing challenges to agricultural input and services markets

entities.name: MARKET VOLATILITY
entities.description: Fluctuations in market prices and availability affecting agricultural inputs

entities.name: GLOBAL SUPPLY CHAIN DISRUPTIONS
entities.description: Interruptions in the international flow of agricultural goods and services

entities.name: UNSUSTAINABLE FARMING PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural methods that degrade natural resources and the environment

entities.name: DIGITAL TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Technological advances used to innovate agricultural input and services markets

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE FARMING
entities.description: Farming practices that meet current food needs without compromising future generations

entities.name: FOOD SYSTEMS
entities.description: The complex network of activities involved in the production, processing, and distribution of food

entities.name: SEEDS
entities.description: High-quality planting materials as a key agricultural input

entities.name: MACHINERY
entities.description: Mechanical tools and equipment used in farming operations

entities.name: FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Chemical or organic substances added to soil to increase crop yield

entities.name: BIO-INPUTS
entities.description: Biological materials used to improve soil health and crop productivity

entities.name: LIVESTOCK SERVICES
entities.description: Support and services provided for the management and health of farm animals

entities.name: CLIMATE SERVICES
entities.description: Information and tools provided to help farmers adapt to climate variability

entities.name: DATA-DRIVEN DIGITAL TOOLS
entities.description: Software and hardware tools that use data to optimize agricultural decisions

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of agricultural production in terms of output per unit of input

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The maintenance of ecological balance and health in agricultural landscapes

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers with small landholdings who face barriers in accessing agricultural inputs

entities.name: PUBLIC AND PRIVATE DELIVERY SYSTEMS
entities.description: The institutional frameworks used to provide agricultural inputs to farmers

entities.name: POLICY PATHWAYS
entities.description: Strategic government actions and regulations to improve agricultural market access

entities.name: FARM INCOMES
entities.description: The total revenue generated from farming activities

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of farming systems to recover from and adapt to shocks

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCES
entities.description: Essential environmental assets like soil and water that need conservation
